## Description

Provide a detailed summary of the changes introduced by this pull request. Explain the problem being solved, the technical implementation details, and any architectural implications.

## Related Issues
Fixes # (link any relevant GitHub issues here)

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Code style / Formatting / Refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] Documentation update

*   **Backend Pytest Suite**: (e.g. `76 passed`)
*   **Frontend Playwright E2E**: (e.g. `12 passed`)
